title: AI boom to fuel India’s data centre surge, Goldman Sachs highlights key growth drivers
description: India is emerging as one of Asia’s fastest-growing data centre markets, powered by rising artificial intelligence (AI) demand, favourable demographics, a large engineering talent base and its strategic location close to the Middle East, according to Goldman Sachs Research.
content:
India is set for rapid expansion in the global data centre ecosystem as artificial intelligence accelerates demand for digital infrastructure, a Goldman Sachs Research report said.

title: Elon Musk Warns AI May Outperform Humanity's Collective Intelligence in Just 5 Years
description: Elon Musk predicts AI could surpass the combined intelligence of humanity within five years, accelerating the path toward a future shaped by advanced artificial intelligence.
content: Elon Musk has predicted that artificial intelligence could surpass the combined intelligence of humanity within the next four to five years. Responding to comments from Peter H. Diamandis on X, Musk suggested that AI's rapid progress may soon outpace... [2525 chars]

title: Tony Leung: 'AI in Hollywood is a double-edged sword'
description: Tony Leung reflected on the impact artificial intelligence is having on Hollywood, and said that while it saves money, it also takes away the “soul” of projects.
content:
Actor Tony Leung thinks the use of AI in the film industry is a “double-edged sword”

title: New cameras switched on as drivers face six points on licence
description: Artificial intelligence will help new cameras detect more drivers
content:
Artificial intelligence will help new cameras detect more drivers
New roadside cameras have gone live with rule-breaking drivers warned they face six points on their licences.

title: Samsung sharpens HBM strategy; Pursues long-term AI customer supply accords at Global Strategy Meeting
description: Samsung Electronics sharpened its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) strategy at its biannual global strategy meeting last week, reviewing plans to expand shipments and secure long-term supply agreements with major artificial intelligence customers. The company took these steps as a tightening memory supply and soaring AI demand boosted the strategic importance of HBM.

title: Kirloskar Oil Engines Stock Jumps 20% To Hit Upper Circuit On Back Of 196 MW Power Generation Deal For AI Data Centres
description: The stock of Kirloskar Oil Engines surged 20 percent on Monday to hit upper circuit as it secured a major power generation order for artificial intelligence infrastructure. The stock opened 5.4 percent higher at Rs 2,100 apiece compared to the previous close of Rs 1,992 apiece. It further jumped to Rs 2,390 apiece to climb 20 percent and hit upper circuit. The stock also reached its 52-week high
content:
The stock of Kirloskar Oil Engines surged 20 percent on Monday to hit upper circuit as the company secured a major power generation order for artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Elon Musk says AI will probably become smarter than all humans in 4 years
description: Elon Musk believes artificial intelligence will probably exceed the combined intelligence of all humans within the next four to five years.
content: AI is getting smarter by the day, and if Elon Musk is to be believed, the technology is on track to surpass the intelligence of all humans combined within the next four to five years. Musk's bold prediction came in response to a post on X by entrepre... [3077 chars]

title: Kaushik Basu: why artificial general intelligence poses structural risks to society as we know it
description: It could render vast numbers unemployed and deprived of livelihood. Even a universal basic income wouldn’t make up for the extreme concentrations of wealth and power it could cause. We must think hard about all this.
content:
To be sure, some scepticism is warranted when assessing the potential benefits of technological advances.

title: The Reverse Centaur’s Guide to Life After AI by Cory Doctorow review - the real price of artificial intelligence
description: A vivid and entertaining polemnic on the economics of the tech revolution, filled with righteous ire
